---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a Cicada Sense improvement
title: "[FEATURE] - short description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or opportunity

Describe the user need, operational gap, or developer workflow friction.

## Desired outcome

Describe what should be possible after this change.

## Affected area

- [ ] Backend domain or API
- [ ] Frontend monitoring workspace
- [ ] Live data generator
- [ ] Fixtures or scenarios
- [ ] Docker Compose, Makefile, or CI
- [ ] Helm or deployment

## Acceptance notes

List observable behavior, tests, docs, or fixture scenarios that would make the feature complete.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, sketches, references, or technical constraints if applicable.
